scope.target: Current finding reproduction and patch-impact inventory
constraints: Do not implement a correction during triage
Stop and name the v0.5.0 owner for any non-patch candidate

steps: Inspect the baseline assessment and independent source plan
Reproduce selected observations with direct repository evidence
Classify each candidate as patch, stale, already resolved, or v0.5.0 disposition
Freeze exact target files and validation commands
execution.last_completed_step: Reproduced all selected observations and froze exact patch, stale, already-resolved, and v0.5.0 dispositions.
execution.next_action: Activate V042-002 for runtime wrapper and routing corrections.

results.summary: All four blockers have patch-compatible correction paths. New semantic validation/CI, adapter contracts, template removal, runner redesign, and SDK FAIL-to-SKIP behavior remain explicitly assigned to v0.5.0.
results.residual_risk: Hosted Ubuntu evidence remains pending; macOS is intentionally unverified; implementation may still expose a candidate that crosses the patch-impact gate.
